response.title: DeepSeek-R2 benchmark results
response.body: Existing post about DeepSeek-R2 benchmark results, posted 2 days ago.
response.author: another_user

comments.body:
Update: DeepSeek-R2 has achieved new SOTA results on several benchmarks. Latest numbers:

- MMLU: 85.4% (5-shot)
- GSM8K: 92.1% (majority vote)
- HumanEval: 78.0% (pass@1)
- MATH: 52.3% (4-shot)
- AGIEval: 75.2%

These results place DeepSeek-R2 among the top open-source models, competitive with GPT-4 Turbo. The model shows strong reasoning and coding capabilities.

Released on Feb 20, 2025. More details at official blog.

National regulators will have increased powers to conduct audits and impose fines up to 7% of global turnover for serious violations.

response.title: new EU AI Act enforcement guidelines
response.body: Existing post about new EU AI Act enforcement guidelines, posted 2 days ago.
response.author: another_user

comments.body:
**Update (March 2025):** The European Commission has released detailed implementation guidelines for the EU AI Act's enforcement mechanisms, focusing on high‑risk AI system assessments, conformity procedures, and the role of national supervisory authorities. Key points:

• **Harmonized standards** for transparency, data governance, and human oversight are now available for providers of high‑risk AI systems.
• **Notified bodies** can begin certification processes from April 2025, with a transitional period for existing systems.
• **Enforcement priorities** include generative AI models with systemic risk, biometric identification, and AI‑enabled recruitment tools.

The guidelines also clarify the "prohibited AI practices" list and provide a template for fundamental‑rights impact assessments. Member states are expected to designate their competent authorities by June 2025.

response.title: DeepSeek-R2 benchmark results
response.body: Existing post about DeepSeek-R2 benchmark results, posted 2 days ago.
response.author: another_user

comments.body:
**Update**: New detailed benchmark results for DeepSeek-R2 have been released, showing significant improvements over previous versions. On MMLU (5-shot), DeepSeek-R2 scores 82.3%, outperforming DeepSeek-R1's 80.1%. On GSM8K, it achieves 91.5% accuracy (8-shot), up from 89.2%. The model also shows strong performance on coding benchmarks like HumanEval (78.7%) and MBPP (75.2%). These results position DeepSeek-R2 as a competitive open-source model in the 67B parameter class.

The benchmarks were conducted by the DeepSeek team and independently verified by several research groups. The model appears particularly strong in mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks.

Source: DeepSeek official blog post published today.

comments.body: The European Commission has just released detailed enforcement guidelines for the EU AI Act, clarifying how national authorities will monitor compliance, conduct audits, and impose penalties. The guidelines emphasize risk-based approach, with stricter oversight for high-risk AI systems. Companies have until mid-2025 to align with the new rules. The guidelines also provide clarity on transparency requirements for generative AI systems and the role of the newly established European AI Office.
